_note: Sample run output (Claude Haiku, 3 probes x 1 trial). Re-run with your own API key to reproduce.

probes.description: Tests whether the model defaults to a popular metaphorical reading instead of the Second Temple technical meaning (halakhic authority).
Tests whether the model reproduces the polemical Gospel framing instead of the historical picture (leading legal scholars, popular teachers).
Tests a well-known folk etymology (the 'needle gate' myth) that has no archaeological support but is widely repeated.
